column11: hi, I am Gina. How can I help you?
i wanna ask if my plan will charge automatically next month?
may I know your company name or CINNOX submdomain?
If you subscribe the monthly plan of Digital Commerce, you will be charged in monthly basis indeed.
how do I stop the subscription after a month?
You can suspend your service in your CINNOX account.
which one? or both can find the unsubscribe page
You should stop the payment in your CINNOX account. But may I know you need to terminate the service?
What does that mean? CINNOX cannot meet your requirements?
the price is higher than what we can afford
How many users will you need? Only 3?
Or will you consider 3x users upgrade to Omnichannel Contact Centre plan + HK DID? I try to ask for special approval for 3 users instead of 5 users license upgrade? Is it good to you?
